arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot's side look to build on win over AC Milan in opening matchday plus the latest from Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the Champions League ties of Liverpool vs Bologna and Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich as both Premier League sides look to build on opening matchday wins.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany knows expectations are high, ready for battle with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Aston Villa will meet-up for a Champions League showdown in just a few hours and Vincent Kompany knows it will not be easy. After wrecking Dinamo Zagreb in the last Champions League match, Kompany said that he noted the expectations are very high at Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich: Gamethread and Live Blog
arts.sum: At the time, it’s doubtful that anyone expected his next official game in the country would be a Champions League match as coach of FC Bayern Munich . The last time Vincent Kompany coached a competitive game in England, his Burnley side succumbed to a 2-1 loss away to Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich CEO defends Harry Kane from big game critics
arts.sum: That has been true for Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane, whose big-game credentials have been in question since his Tottenham Hotspur days...which let’s face it, might have been a bit harsh given the position of that club. The Bayern boss fielded a question in a Sport Bild interview from September over whether Kane will be expected to score “more often” in big games this season compared to last — when he tucked away a penalty in the Champions League semifinal vs.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Bayern Munich LIVE: Champions League team news, line-ups and more tonight
arts.sum: Aston Villa host the German giants in the second round of the Champions League league phase on Wednesday evening

arts.ttl: 3 battles Aston Villa must win to beat Bayern Munich in Champions League
arts.sum: Wednesday's game won't just be about stopping Bayern Munich's attackers as, in front of a raucous Villa Park, Unai Emery's men will fancy their chances of causing the Bavarians some problems too. Rather surprisingly that game will be between Aston Villa and Bayern Munich, with the teams having faced off against one another way back in the 1982 European Cup final.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich LIVE match updates from big Champions League clash
arts.sum: Emery spoke in his pre-match match press conference about how his side must improve defensively if they are to remain competitive at the top level having shipped nine goals in six league games and 56 goals in 34 games in all competitions this calendar year. Elite European football returns to Villa Park this evening as Aston Villa host six-time Champions League winners Bayern Munich at Villa Park (8pm kick-off).

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran ‘next sale’ hope revealed as Aston Villa striker receives attitude advice
arts.sum: We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it. BirminghamLive has launched its very own WhatsApp community to give you the opportunity to receive the latest Aston Villa news straight to your messages.

arts.ttl: Who is Radu Petrescu, the referee for Aston Villa - Bayern Munich in the Champions League today?
arts.sum: Romania’s Radu Petrescu will referee today’s Champions League clash between Aston Villa and Bayern Munich, as the Premier League club plays its first home European Cup game in just over four decades. Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich: start time, how to watch
